content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

All four amendments identify real, code-verified parsing and validation bugs in the bead description processing pipeline. Each describes a concrete scenario where ordinary Markdown content is misclassified, silently collapsed, or causes prompt validation failure. I verified each claim against the actual code and confirm the defects exist.

## Votes

- `fr-10-6ab7d64d`: Accept
  Verified at service.rs:589-591. `is_bead_description_subsection_boundary` matches any line ending in `:` (after trimming). When used at lines 632-637, any blank line in a Non-Goals or Acceptance Criteria section followed by a non-section label like `Details:` or `Context:` will reset `active_section` to `None`, routing subsequent lines into must-do scope. The `previous_line_blank` guard only requires one blank line, which is common within structured section content. This is a real parsing robustness bug.
- `fr-10-18b5cd40`: Accept
  Verified: the renderer at service.rs:824-827 emits `must_do_scope` verbatim under `## Must-Do Scope`. The validator at task_prompt_contract.rs:62-67 (`canonical_section_heading_index`) matches any line starting with `## ` whose title exactly equals a canonical section name. Since must_do_scope is not fenced or escaped, a bead description containing e.g. `## Review Policy` in its body text will appear as an out-of-order canonical heading, causing the validator at lines 162-188 to report an ordering error. This is a correctness mismatch between the generator and its own validator.
- `fr-10-a5ffc77c`: Accept
  Verified at service.rs:550-552. `collect_section_items` only recognizes `- ` and `* ` as bullet prefixes. Numbered Markdown list items (`1. ...`, `2. ...`) fall through to lines 562-569 where they are appended to the current string with space separators, collapsing multiple distinct criteria or non-goals into a single item. Numbered lists are a common Markdown pattern, so this is a real semantic loss that silently changes the number and structure of extracted items.
- `fr-10-2303c4db`: Accept
  Verified: `markdown_heading_title` (line 480-486) returns the title with trailing colon preserved (e.g. `Non-goals:` from `## Non-goals:`). `normalized_section_label` (line 488-494) filters only `-`, `_`, and ` ` ŌĆö NOT `:`. So `Non-goals:` normalizes to `nongoals:`, which does not match the expected `nongoals` at line 498. The non-heading path at lines 510-512 strips trailing `:` but the heading path does not, so `## Non-goals:` and `## Acceptance Criteria:` ŌĆö common Markdown conventions ŌĆö fail to be recognized, leaving their content in must-do scope and potentially triggering the 'no explicit acceptance criteria' fallback at line 784-787.
